name: Make Up Human
short_description: Combine body parts to create a person!
detailed_description:
Make up a person by combining body parts!

"Make Up Human" is a 3D puzzle game.
Drop human body parts such as eyes and ears into a box.

When the same parts come into contact with each other, they will change into the next level part.

Parts will age over time and will never be able to change again.
Be careful, as in rare cases they may not age and become cancerous!

If you're lucky, you might find a special part that can change any part.

If even one part falls outside the box, it's game over.

Video Distribution

・Distribution is available without permission.
・Monetization is only possible when using the functions provided by the video distribution site.
・We would appreciate it if you include the name of the game in the title of your video or live broadcast, or include a link to the Steam page in the summary section.

We will not be liable for any damages caused by the distribution of videos of this game.
The contents of these guidelines are subject to change without notice.
